summary: China had fewer tourists than Saudi Arabia last year. To bring back visitors, the country should make the most of the Chinamaxxing movement, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Juliana Liu. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, Goldman Sachs Head of Asset Allocation Research; Philipp Freise, KKR Co-Head of European Private Equity; Sarah Kapnick, JPMorgan Global Head of Climate Advisory (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Egypt Asset Sales Ease Path Toward $1.6 Billion in IMF Funding
title_cn: 埃及资产出售进展顺利 争取 16 亿美元国际货币基金组织融资
summary: Egypt’s recent state-asset sales have satisfied the targets of an International Monetary Fund review, according to people familiar with the matter, easing the path to unlock about $1.6 billion in financing for an economy buffeted by the Iran war.

title: Gold Climbs Above $4,000 After Inflation Print Slows Decline
title_cn: 通胀放缓导致金价攀升至 4,000 美元以上
summary: Gold climbed above $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest since November.

title: Metinvest Seeks New Investor for Italy’s Landmark Steel Project
title_cn: Metinvest 为意大利标志性钢铁项目寻找新投资者
summary: Metinvest Holding is looking for a new investor to provide equity financing for a €3 billion ($3.4 billion) steel plant in Italy as the Ukrainian group tries to downsize its commitment.

title: AI Trade’s Bruising Week Forces Investors to Be More Selective
title_cn: AI Trade 的惨痛一周迫使投资者更加挑剔
summary: This roller-coaster week for tech stocks from Seoul to New York fueled by extreme investor positioning and worries over chip demand is sending a strong signal: the case for the artificial-intelligence trade is still strong, but the days of everything going up in a straight line appear to be over.

title: Why the AI Boom Is Making Everything More Expensive
title_cn: 为什么人工智能的繁荣让一切变得更加昂贵
summary: AI demand is triggering a historic memory-chip shortage. Meeting exponential demand for chips will be expensive and maybe even impossible.

title: Ship Struck in Hormuz, Apple's Price Hikes Hit iPads & Macs | The Opening Trade 6/26/2026
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海难，苹果 iPad 和 Mac 涨价开盘交易 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary:
A ship was hit by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday in the first reported attack since an interim US-Iran peace deal, marking a setback to efforts to restore traffic through the vital energy thoroughfare. 

Apple shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday, seeking to offset cost hikes caused by an unprecedented shortage of memory chips and storage.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Fall on Renewed Tech Woes; Zalando Declines
title_cn: 欧洲股市因新一轮科技困境而下跌；扎兰多衰落
summary: European shares fell from record levels amid shifting sentiment toward artificial intelligence and technology stocks.

title: JPMorgan's Kapnick on Europe Power Grid & Renewables Investment
title_cn: 摩根大通的卡普尼克谈欧洲电网和可再生能源投资
summary: The global economy will see $1 trillion of losses per year by 2050 if we don't adapt to changing climate patterns says Sarah Kapnick, Global Head of Climate Advisory at JPMorgan. She sees this leading to a 'structural investment trend' which will see more investment in the power grid and energy transition, especially geothermal and nuclear energy. She spoke to Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden on "The Pulse." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Makes Its Advertising Pitch at Cannes Festival
title_cn: OpenAI 在戛纳电影节上进行广告宣传
summary: The ChatGPT maker offers the industry a new marketing vehicle

summary: Executives from German satellite firm OHB SE and KKR & Co. rang the opening bell at the Frankfurt Stock Exchange on Friday after they raised €789 million in a share sale to increase investors’ access to the space company.

title: SoftBank Shares Fall on Report OpenAI to Delay IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 推迟 IPO 消息导致软银股价下跌
summary: SoftBank Group’s stock tumbled the most since August 2024 after reports that OpenAI may hold off on an initial public offering until next year, delaying returns for its Japanese backer. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Washington’s Foreign Ban on Anthropic’s Top Models May Backfire
title_cn: 华盛顿对 Anthropic 顶级模特的外国禁令可能会适得其反
summary: The move may act as a tailwind for rival China, boosting demand for the Asian nation’s open source AI.

title: VW Eyes as Many as 100,000 Job Cuts
title_cn: 大众预计裁员多达 10 万人
summary: Volkswagen is looking to cut tens of thousands of additional jobs and may shutter factories in a push by CEO Oliver Blume to make Europe’s biggest automaker more competitive, according to a report in Manager Magazin. Bloomberg's Elisabeth Behrmann has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Price
title_cn: 苹果提高股价，人工智能成本现实检验冲击亚洲科技股
summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. raised prices for their products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.

title: Goldman: Could Make Sense to Diversify Away From Chipmakers
title_cn: 高盛：摆脱芯片制造商的多元化可能是有意义的
summary: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, managing director for portfolio strategy and asset allocation at Goldman Sachs, discusses the tech selloff and why he thinks it could make sense to diversify away from semiconductor makers and lean more toward hyperscalers. "These are incredibly cyclical companies," Mueller-Glissmann tells Bloomberg Television. "So to some extent, it could make sense to diversify a bit away from them." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GCash Owner Said to Seek $1.5 Billion in Record Philippine IPO
title_cn: GCash 所有者据称将寻求 15 亿美元的菲律宾首次公开募股
summary: The company behind the Philippines’ biggest mobile wallet GCash is preparing what may become the country’s biggest initial public offering ever, seeking to raise as much as 92.3 billion pesos ($1.5 billion).

title: Bain, LY Near a Binding Offer for Kakaku in Bidding War With EQT
title_cn: 贝恩公司 (LY) 在与 EQT 的竞购战中接近对 Kakaku 发出有约束力的报价
summary: Bain Capital and LY Corp. are poised to make a binding bid for Kakaku.com Inc., challenging a tender offer from EQT AB that values the price-comparison site operator at around ¥595 billion ($3.7 billion).

title: Brutal Week of Swings Leaves Korea’s AI Stock Rally in Turmoil
title_cn: 剧烈的一周波动让韩国人工智能股的涨势陷入混乱
summary: South Korean stocks went from euphoria to anxiety in a gut-wrenching week that exposed just how fragile the AI rally has become.

title: Omnicom Chief Defends Interpublic Deal as AI Rattles Ad Industry
title_cn: 宏盟首席执行官为人工智能扰乱广告行业的 Interpublic 交易辩护
summary: John Wren, the chief executive officer of ad giant Omnicom Group Inc., said he’s starting to see results after closing the deal for rival Interpublic Group about seven months ago — racking up customer wins and cost savings. He’s still got to convince the market.

title: China’s Hardware Tech Stocks Look to Earnings to Sustain Rally
title_cn: 中国硬件科技股依靠盈利来维持涨势
summary: Chinese hardware technology stocks have been on a tear. The next challenge is showing the earnings to back it up.

title: World Bank, AfDB to Boost African Electrification Plan This Year
title_cn: 世界银行和非洲开发银行今年将推动非洲电气化计划
summary: The World Bank and African Development Bank plan to accelerate their program to bring electricity to hundreds of millions of Africans this year by approving new projects, investing in Eritrea and promoting the development of regional power pools.

title: SoftBank Shares Tumble After Report of OpenAI’s IPO Delay
title_cn: OpenAI IPO 延迟报道后软银股价暴跌
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s stock fell the most since August 2024 on concerns that OpenAI may hold off on an initial public offering until next year and delay returns for its Japanese backer.

title: Korean Stocks Plunge 9% on Chip Selloff
title_cn: 芯片抛售导致韩国股市暴跌 9%
summary: South Korean stocks were hit by a second trading suspension this week as chipmakers plunged, highlighting the market’s sensitivity to swings in global artificial-intelligence sentiment. The benchmark Kospi extended losses after the Korea Exchange’s 20 minute trading halt, falling as much as 9%. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Southern Italy Drives Economic Growth
title_cn: 意大利南部推动经济增长
summary: Naples is leading a regional revival in Italy, fueled by European Union cash and investments in technology and infrastructure. The economy of the Campania region, where Naples is located, grew 0.9% last year, outstripping the 0.7% in Milan’s province of Lombardy and well ahead of the 0.5% national average, according to Bank of Italy data. Bloomberg's Alessandra Migliaccio reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Shares Fall After Prices Increase for Macs, iPads
title_cn: Mac、iPad 价格上涨后苹果股价下跌
summary: Apple Inc. shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro to offset cost hikes caused by a shortage of memory chips and storage. The price increases are in effect globally and are largely unprecedented, with no equivalent in the company's modern history of sweeping hikes across much of its product line. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will Gamers Ignore GTA VI’s Hefty $80 Price Tag?
title_cn: 玩家会忽视 GTA VI 高达 80 美元的标价吗？
summary:
Grand Theft Auto VI’s $79.99 launch price marks a new high for mainstream video games and signals a potential shift in industry pricing power. This segment examines how Rockstar’s strategy could reshape revenue models and consumer expectations.
Joost van Dreunen, NYU Stern Adjunct Assistant Professor and author of One Up: Creativity, Competition, and the Global Business of Video Games, joined Paul Allen on Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss the implications. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SemiAnalysis Xie on Asia AI Supply Chain
title_cn: 谢半分析谈亚洲人工智能供应链
summary:
Myron Xie, AI supply chain research lead at SemiAnalysis, explains who, within Asia's 
hardware suppliers, are standing out as the winners in the market's surge in AI demand.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg Tech: Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: State Street: Asia May Win in AI Boom
title_cn: 道富银行：亚洲可能在人工智能繁荣中获胜
summary: Ninghui Liu, Head of APAC Investment Strategy and Research at State Street Investment Management, discusses why he thinks Asia may be the biggest beneficiary in the global AI boom. He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg Tech: Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: More Expensive iPhones on the Horizon?
title_cn: 更昂贵的iPhone即将问世？
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence says Apple has to hike prices for its iPhones after raising prices for its Macs, iPads and home devices. Those hikes went into effect globally on Thursday. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Technology Analyst Anurag Rana spoke with Bloomberg's Yvonne Man and Avril Hong on "Bloomberg: The China Show." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung, SK Hynix Reportedly Preparing Huge AI Spending Push
title_cn: 据报道，三星和 SK 海力士准备大力推动人工智能支出
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. are preparing to announce hundreds of billions of dollars worth in new investments on Monday, according to South Korean media reports this week.

title: Drone Startup Elroy Air Is Said to Near $800 Million SPAC Deal
title_cn: 无人机初创公司 Elroy Air 据称将完成近 8 亿美元的 SPAC 交易
summary: Elroy Air Inc., a cargo drone startup aiming to replace delivery trucks, is in advanced talks to go public through a merger with a blank-check vehicle that will create a company with an enterprise value of about $1 billion.

title: Apple Supplier Lingyi Rises in HK After $1.1 Billion Debut
title_cn: 苹果供应商灵一在香港上市，估值达 11 亿美元
summary: Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. a Chinese electronic supplier for Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc., rose in its Hong Kong debut after raising HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion) in a share sale, part of the city’s busiest month for listings this year.

title: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Stagger AI Model Release
title_cn: 特朗普政府要求 OpenAI 错开人工智能模型发布时间
summary: The Trump administration has asked OpenAI to stagger the release of an upcoming powerful artificial intelligence model, according to a person familiar with the matter, nearly two weeks after rival Anthropic PBC suspended its most capable offerings from the market under regulatory pressure.

title: Germany Weighs €20 Billion Tax Cut as Merz Seizes Momentum
title_cn: Merz 乘势而上，德国考虑减税 200 亿欧元
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition is negotiating as much as €20 billion ($22.8 billion) in income-tax relief as it taps momentum for its broader reform agenda, though the parties remain divided on how to pay for the cuts.

title: Venezuela Quake Crisis Tests Legitimacy of Rodriguez Regime
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震危机考验罗德里格斯政权的合法性
summary: The earthquakes that struck Venezuela Wednesday have become the first major political test for acting President Delcy Rodríguez, with the disaster quickly evolving into a contest over competence.

title: Tanzania Bans Political Rallies, Bracing for Gen-Z Protests
title_cn: 坦桑尼亚禁止政治集会，为 Z 世代抗议做好准备
summary: Tanzania’s authorities banned political rallies and placed the country on high alert for youth-led protests against increased authoritarianism.

title: Chaotic Push to Train Staff for US Ebola Outbreak Facility Alarms Health Workers
title_cn: 美国埃博拉疫情设施培训工作人员的混乱推动给卫生工作者敲响了警钟
summary: The three-day session focused more on administrative tasks than spread prevention.

title: China’s State Media Say EU Risks ‘Freezing’ of Ties Over Trade
title_cn: 中国官方媒体称欧盟面临“冻结”贸易关系的风险
summary: Chinese state media accused European Union officials of a “lack of sincerity” in preparatory talks ahead of a meeting between top trade negotiators, and warned that relations between the two regions could be damaged.

title: Europe Must Pressure Putin More as Ukraine Attacks, Estonia Says
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚称，乌克兰袭击时欧洲必须向普京施加更多压力
summary: Estonia called for more “strategic patience” and increased pressure on Russia from European allies as President Vladimir Putin faces long-range attacks from Ukraine.

title: Ukraine’s Crimea Attacks Expose Limits of Putin’s Protection
title_cn: 乌克兰克里米亚袭击暴露了普京保护的局限性
summary: Vladimir Putin’s war in Ukraine is rebounding on Russia in Crimea, amid escalating attacks on the Black Sea peninsula that he annexed in 2014.

title: Morgan Stanley Upbeat on South African Assets Despite Headwinds
title_cn: 尽管面临阻力，摩根士丹利仍看好南非资产
summary: Morgan Stanley is positive on South African assets as headwinds from the Iran war fade, arguing that an approaching end to interest-rate hikes and further credit-rating upgrades will provide support.

title: Make Dulles Great Again: a $22 Billion Plan to Fix the Airport
title_cn: 让杜勒斯再次伟大：耗资 220 亿美元修复机场的计划
summary: A $22 billion proposal to renovate the DC-area airport in 8 years

title: UK’s Polanski Says Chancellor Streeting Would Be ‘Disastrous’
title_cn: 英国波兰斯基称财政大臣斯特里廷将是“灾难性的”
summary: Green Party leader Zack Polanski backed Ed Miliband over “disastrous” Wes Streeting to become the UK’s next chancellor in the latest sign of pressure building on Andy Burnham to name someone who will please the disaffected left.

title: Romanian President Has Two Choices for Premier to End Crisis
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统有两种总理结束危机的选择
summary: Romania’s political establishment failed to break its deadlock as the four parties from the recently broken coalition offered competing candidates for the prime minister’s post.

title: Rats in the Chamber Show Johannesburg’s Decline
title_cn: 会议厅里的老鼠表明约翰内斯堡的衰落
summary: South Africa’s largest and most important city is “essentially bankrupt.”

title: Steve Hilton Says Trump isn't on California Ballot
title_cn: 史蒂夫·希尔顿表示特朗普不在加州选票上
summary:
Is Donald Trump a help or a hindrance in California?

Mishal Husain asks Republican candidate for governor Steve Hilton whether he wants the US president on the campaign trail. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Traffic Still Flowing Despite Strike on Ship
title_cn: 尽管船舶罢工，霍尔木兹交通仍然畅通
summary: An attack on a container vessel sailing through the Strait of Hormuz has prompted some shipowners to review exit plans, but traffic continued to flow in both directions through the vital thoroughfare on Friday. Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Founder Delo Seals UK Return to Fund Farage War Chest
title_cn: 英国加密货币创始人 Delo 重返英国资助 Farage 战争基金
summary: Crypto entrepreneur Ben Delo finalized his return to the UK from Hong Kong, clearing the Reform donor’s path to bankroll Nigel Farage’s right-wing party as the nation cracks down on offshore political finance.

title: Zelenskyy Orders Push to End War as Russia Attacked by Drones
title_cn: 俄罗斯遭到无人机袭击，泽连斯基下令结束战争
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy approved a 40-day “influence operation” to convince the Kremlin to end the war, as Russia said several regions were attacked in one of Kyiv’s most intense drone strikes in more than four years of war.

title: Odd Lots: Rory Johnston on Why Oil Didn’t Hit $200 (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：罗里约翰斯顿谈为什么石油没有达到 200 美元（播客）
summary: The Strait of Hormuz has (mostly) re-opened! Crude prices are still up since the start of the war with Iran, but popular predictions earlier this year of $200-a-barrel Brent didn’t pan out. Why is that? We last talked to Rory Johnston, the founder of the Commodity Context newsletter, at the start of the conflict. And in that conversation he said that the Strait’s closure would lead to $200 oil if it persisted for any length of time. Today, he returns to tell us what he’s learned about the oil ma

title: Burnham Inherits an Economy That’s Just Starting to Look Up
title_cn: 伯纳姆继承了一个刚刚开始好转的经济
summary: As Keir Starmer was reeling from heavy local election losses last month, it was hard to see why anyone would be trying to take over the embattled prime minister’s job.

title: US Envoy to Italy Praises Meloni, Downplays Trump Spat
title_cn: 美国驻意大利特使赞扬梅洛尼，淡化特朗普的口角
summary: The US ambassador to Italy moved to further ease tensions between the two allies, saying relations are “fine” in the aftermath of a public clash between Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump.

title: Bayer’s Supreme Court Win in Roundup Case No ‘Silver Bullet’
title_cn: 拜耳最高法院在农达案中获胜，没有“银弹”
summary: After years of legal setbacks that have cost billions of dollars over its top-selling Roundup weedkiller, Bayer AG finally got a resounding win in the biggest tribunal of all.

title: Tech Stocks Selloff After Apple Price Hikes, OpenAI IPO Report | Daybreak Europe 6/26/2026
title_cn: 苹果股价上涨、OpenAI IPO 报告导致科技股遭遇抛售黎明欧洲 6/26/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Global stocks slumped to a two-week low in a rapid reversal from Thursday’s jump, when Micron Technology's bullish forecast and a US-listing planned by SK Hynix boosted optimism over the sustainability of the AI trade. 

Apple shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday. Sentiment was also dragged lower by a report that OpenAI may hold off on an initial public offering until next year.

And oil was on track for a weekly decline after transits through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated, although an attack on a cargo ship has renewed concerns about safe passage through the vital waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lescure Sticks With 5% French Deficit After Watchdog Rebuke
title_cn: 监管机构斥责后，法国 Lescure 仍维持 5% 赤字
summary: Finance Minister Roland Lescure reaffirmed his commitment to lower France’s deficit after the country’s fiscal watchdog rebuked the government’s pending plans.

title: Japan’s Lower House Passes Bill Banning National Flag Vandalism
title_cn: 日本众议院通过禁止破坏国旗的法案
summary: Japan’s lower house passed a bill banning the desecration of the national flag, highlighting Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s efforts to win over the growing ranks of conservative voters.

title: Johannesburg Collapse Risk Spurs Call for State to Run City
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡崩溃风险促使人们呼吁国家管理城市
summary: South Africa’s government may soon need to make the politically fraught decision to take control of Johannesburg to avert the city’s financial collapse, according to a consultant appointed by two of the country’s leading business groups.

title: Steve Hilton: Trump Isn’t on California Ballot
title_cn: 史蒂夫·希尔顿：特朗普不在加州选票上
summary: The Republican candidate for governor of California and former UK political adviser on the race, the state’s challenges and Donald Trump’s endorsement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Supertankers Turn Back Again From Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 超级油轮再次从霍尔木兹海峡返回
summary: A ship was hit by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, marking a setback to efforts to restore traffic through the vital energy thoroughfare. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel Keeps Grip on Lebanon as Beirut Eyes Hezbollah-Free Zone
title_cn: 贝鲁特着眼于无真主党区，以色列继续控制黎巴嫩
summary: The Israeli and Lebanese governments are discussing locations for US-proposed areas in southern Lebanon where the Beirut government could prove its ability to keep out Hezbollah.

title: Ship Struck in Hormuz as Oil Supertankers Turn Back Again
title_cn: 超级油轮再次返航，霍尔木兹发生船舶碰撞
summary: A ship was hit by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday in the first reported attack since an interim US-Iran peace deal, marking a setback to efforts to restore traffic through the vital energy thoroughfare.

title: Naples Outpaces Milan as Southern Italy Drives Economic Growth
title_cn: 意大利南部推动经济增长 那不勒斯超越米兰
summary: The south has historically lagged the north — but that’s changing.
